## Summary

Describe the contract or behavior changed and the evidence used to verify it.

## Release-safety checklist

- [ ] I did not promote software-call/LLVM-CFG structure to HLS hardware topology.
- [ ] Directives have an explicit, deterministic scope or an incomplete/ambiguous diagnostic.
- [ ] Predictions remain outside observations and verified tool truth.
- [ ] Correctness, resource fit, and post-route timing remain independent.
- [ ] Fixtures and reports are synthetic, licensed, authorized, or demonstrably sanitized.
- [ ] No private source body, credentials, hostnames, vendor PDFs, or proprietary artifacts were added.
- [ ] New bundled third-party code has SPDX/license/NOTICE/SBOM updates.
- [ ] Tests cover both the success path and fail-closed behavior.
